mapper.insert: INSERT INTO families (id, name, invite_code, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{name}, #{inviteCode}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM families WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
